title: System Settings
description: Manage your organization settings and configuration lists.

info.title: System Settings
info.description: System Settings allow you to configure global parameters that affect how MapexOS operates. Manage persistence policies, data retention rules, and system-wide configurations to optimize performance and meet compliance requirements.

policies.title: Persistence Policies
policies.text: Define how long different types of data are retained in the system database

retention.title: Data Retention Rules
retention.text: Configure retention periods for events, telemetry, audit logs, and notifications

systemWide.title: System-Wide Configuration
systemWide.text: Settings apply to all organizations and users within your MapexOS instance

performance.title: Performance Optimization
performance.text: Balance data retention with system performance and storage capacity

backup.title: Backup Settings
backup.text: Ensure compliance with data governance policies and regulatory requirements

accessPolicyModal.title: Access Policy Information
accessPolicyModal.rolePolicyDescription: Role Policy defines how user roles and permissions are inherited from parent organizations in the hierarchy.
accessPolicyModal.rolePolicyMergeDescription: User roles from parent organizations are merged with roles assigned directly to this organization. Users will have access to both parent and local roles, providing cumulative permissions across the hierarchy.
accessPolicyModal.rolePolicyStrictDescription: Only roles explicitly assigned to this organization are applied. Parent organization roles are ignored, providing strict isolation of permissions at this level.
accessPolicyModal.defaultScopeDescription: Default Scope determines the default visibility scope for data and operations within the organization hierarchy.
accessPolicyModal.defaultScopeRecursiveDescription: Operations and queries apply recursively to this organization and all its child organizations. Users will see data from the entire sub-hierarchy below this organization.
accessPolicyModal.defaultScopeLocalDescription: Operations and queries apply only to this organization. Child organization data is excluded by default, providing isolated scope at this level.

disableModal.title: Disable Organization
disableModal.message: Are you sure you want to disable this organization? All users belonging to this organization will no longer be able to log in.

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the list item "{value}"?

persistence.title: Data retention policies
persistence.description: Configure how long data is stored before automatic deletion.

eventsRaw.title: Raw Events
eventsRaw.description: Stores unprocessed events as they arrive from devices and external sources. These are temporary events used for initial processing and routing.

eventsJsExecutor.title: JS Executor Events
eventsJsExecutor.description: Stores events generated during JavaScript code execution. Includes logs, errors, and execution results from custom scripts.

eventsRouter.title: Router Events
eventsRouter.description: Stores routing information and decisions made by the event router. Tracks how events were distributed across the system.

events.title: Events
events.description: Main event storage for processed and enriched events. This is the primary lakehouse for historical event analysis and reporting.

eventsWorkflow.title: Workflow Executions
eventsWorkflow.description: Stores workflow execution history including status, duration, node outputs, and error details. Used for debugging and analytics.

eventsAudit.title: Audit Events
eventsAudit.description: Stores audit trail events for compliance and security monitoring. Required for regulatory compliance. Minimum retention: 1 year, recommended: 7 years.

eventsNotifications.title: Notification Events
eventsNotifications.description: Stores notification delivery events including emails, SMS, push notifications, and webhooks. Tracks delivery status and failures.

groups.pipelineDescription: Short-term retention for event processing pipeline stages
groups.storageDescription: Long-term retention for storage, notifications and audit

messages.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all retention policies to default values?
messages.complianceWarning: Compliance requirement: minimum 1 year (365 days) for audit events
messages.lakeHouseWarning: Low retention period. Consider using LakeHouse functionality to export these events to an Object Storage system like S3 / MinIO.
